title: Gurugram, Haryana — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Gurugram, Haryana: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Gurugram is a city in Haryana with a population of 1,200,000. India’s corporate capital and a major IT and financial hub southwest of Delhi, known for its skyscrapers and modern infrastructure.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
